---
name: Persona proposal
about: Propose a new specialist persona for the council
title: 'persona: <name>'
labels: persona-proposal
---

<!-- See agents/INDEX.md for the persona catalog + promotion criteria. New personas start
     [experimental] and graduate to stable after they earn net-new catches on real councils. -->

## Persona name
<!-- kebab-case, e.g. `infra-fin` or `privacy-counsel`. -->

## Lens (one sentence)
<!-- What single judgment lens does this persona own that no current persona covers? -->

## Why an existing persona is not enough
<!-- Specifically: which existing persona is closest, and what does it miss?
     If the answer is "nothing concrete," this persona is probably not needed. -->

## Default verdict bias
<!-- e.g. "skews BLOCK on data leakage" / "skews SHIP unless explicit privacy violation." -->

## Counterweight relationships
<!-- Which existing personas does it agree with (false-consensus risk)?
     Which does it oppose (productive friction)?
     See agents/INDEX.md's "Tends to agree with" column. -->

## Selection rule
<!-- One row to add to the orchestrator selection table. Format:
     | <task signal> | <this-persona>, <peer>, <peer> | -->

## Evidence this would help
<!-- A real artifact where the existing 6 (or 16) personas missed something this lens catches.
     Without a concrete miss, this is probably scope creep — see agents/INDEX.md promotion criteria. -->
